title: Sounds Of Joining
description: Plays a configurable sound when a configurable player joins
body:
Introducing:

**The Sounds Of Joining**

**Prepare Thyself** for one of the most obnoxious mods ever created! this mod allows you to play a sound of your chosing whenever you or anyone else you choose enters your game or your server.

preview: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZjqX3k-TPh0 

**Rundown**

it works by checking the joining player's UUID and then checking if said UUID matches any that were set within the config (soundsofjoining-common.toml within the config folder).

all you need to do to get the UUID you wish to announce is getting it from a site such as  https://mcuuid.net/  and insert it into the config. Additionally, the sound played can be changed with a resourcepack.

 

**Questions**

For everyone who wants to ask them, i am very active on my Discord Server. any and all questions can be asked there. I'm not completely against backporting this mod, if you need it for a server, let me know.

 

**Credits**

Shoutouts to SammySemicolon, GiantLuigi, BabyBlueSheep and Arathian for answering any of my questions, you people are awesome. Check out Malum and it's discord server to meet them!
